name: BulkDesign
tagline: Graphic design. Templates, brand kits, resize, background removal, team collab. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><radialGradient id="pal-bg" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f5efe5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ddd5c5"/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="92" rx="35" ry="4" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.12)"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="48" rx="40" ry="35" fill="url(#pal-bg)" stroke="#b0a898" stroke-width="1.2"/><ellipse cx="60" cy="62" rx="8" ry="7" fill="#1a2a4a" stroke="#8a8070" stroke-width="1"/><ellipse cx="28" cy="30" rx="7" ry="6" fill="#e63946" stroke="#cc2233" stroke-width=".5"/><ellipse cx="48" cy="22" rx="8" ry="5.5" fill="#457bb8" stroke="#3366aa" stroke-width=".5"/><ellipse cx="68" cy="28" rx="7" ry="5.5" fill="#ffd700" stroke="#c8a200" stroke-width=".5"/><ellipse cx="74" cy="45" rx="6" ry="6.5" fill="#50b860" stroke="#3a9a48" stroke-width=".5"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="50" rx="6.5" ry="6" fill="#9b59b6" stroke="#7a3e96" stroke-width=".5"/><ellipse cx="22" cy="40" rx="5" ry="5.5" fill="#f39c12" stroke="#d48800" stroke-width=".5"/></svg>

features.title: Template Library
features.desc: Thousands of templates for social media, presentations, flyers, logos, and more. Professional designs ready to customize in seconds.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.desc: Save your brand colors, fonts, and logos. Apply them to any design with one click. Ensure consistency across all your materials.

features.title: Magic Resize
features.desc: Design once, resize for any platform. Instagram post to Twitter header to LinkedIn banner with one click. Smart layout adjustment.

features.title: Background Removal
features.desc: AI-powered background removal in one click. Perfect cutouts for product photos, portraits, and composite images.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.desc: Shared asset library, design comments, and approval workflows. Everyone on your team works from the same brand assets.

features.title: Multi-Format Export
features.desc: Export as PNG, JPG, PDF, SVG, or GIF. Print-ready PDFs with bleed marks. Transparent PNG backgrounds for web.

useCases.title: Social Media Managers
useCases.desc: Create scroll-stopping posts in minutes. Templates for every platform, magic resize for cross-posting, and a content calendar view.

useCases.title: Small Businesses
useCases.desc: Professional marketing materials without a designer. Flyers, menus, business cards, and social graphics all from one tool.

useCases.title: Content Creators
useCases.desc: YouTube thumbnails, podcast covers, and blog graphics. Brand kit keeps your visual identity consistent across all platforms.
